headline: Is Kraft Heinz (KHC) Now Offering Value After Years Of Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Kraft Heinz at around US$23.18 is a bargain or a value trap, the answer depends on how you interpret what the current share price is implying. The stock has returned 3.1% over the last week, even though the 30-day return is a 5.5% decline and the 1-year return sits at a 10.9% decline, so short-term sentiment looks different from the longer-term picture. Recent headlines around Kraft Heinz have focused on its position in packaged foods and consumer brands, with...

headline: Oscar Mayer Unveils First Bacon Innovation in Five Years with New Maple Bourbon Bacon
summary: CHICAGO & PITTSBURGH, April 08, 2026--Today, Oscar Mayer, the brand known for uniting millions around a love of meat, announces its first bacon innovation in five years. Introducing Oscar Mayer Maple Bourbon Bacon—cured with Evan Williams Bourbon, the new offering features thick-cut, expertly trimmed bacon, finished with Oscar Mayer’s signature 12-hour slow smoke and subtle notes of vanilla and caramel from the barrel-aged Kentucky bourbon. content.title: Oscar Mayer Unveils First Bacon Innovation in Five Years with New Maple Bourbon Bacon
content.summary: CHICAGO & PITTSBURGH, April 08, 2026--Today, Oscar Mayer, the brand known for uniting millions around a love of meat, announces its first bacon innovation in five years. Introducing Oscar Mayer Maple Bourbon Bacon—cured with Evan Williams Bourbon, the new offering features thick-cut, expertly trimmed bacon, finished with Oscar Mayer’s signature 12-hour slow smoke and subtle notes of vanilla and caramel from the barrel-aged Kentucky bourbon. Bringing together two iconic brands that are known for

thumbnail.caption: Oscar Mayer introduces Maple Bourbon Bacon cured with Evan Williams Bourbon, featuring thick-cut, expertly trimmed bacon slow-smoked for 12 hours with subtle notes of vanilla and caramel from barrel-aged Kentucky bourbon.

headline: Buffett Regrets Apple Sale As Berkshire Rethinks Stakes And Insurance Risk
summary: Warren Buffett has expressed regret over the timing of Berkshire Hathaway's sale of Apple shares, while keeping Apple as a core holding. Despite stepping down as CEO, Buffett remains involved in capital allocation decisions at NYSE:BRK.B. Berkshire is reassessing its position in both Apple and Kraft Heinz, signaling a shift in how it treats key equity stakes. The company is also participating in a US backed insurance consortium providing coverage for ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Berkshire...
